title: Alfred Kleiner
body: Alfred Kleiner (24 April 1849 – 3 July 1916) was a Swiss physicist and Professor of Experimental Physics at the University of Zurich. He was Albert Einstein's doctoral advisor or Doktorvater. Initially Einstein's advisor was Heinrich F. Weber.  However, they had a major falling out, and Einstein chose to switch to Kleiner.
categories: Academic staff of the University of Zurich
Articles with unsourced statements from February 2013
